summary: Navigation Fix Testing COMPLETE - All navigation tests PASSED. Tested School/Teacher/Parent sidebar navigation and Mobile drawer navigation. All sidebar items now correctly navigate to their sub-routes (/school/students, /school/analytics, /teacher/students, /teacher/tasks, /parent/progress, /parent/feedback, /parent/tasks) and display the appropriate filtered content. Student regression passed (Banner visible, ProtectedRoute working).

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only app, all data is MOCKED)

Click Estadísticas → URL changes to /school/analytics - PASS

Click Tareas → URL changes to /teacher/tasks - PASS

ProtectedRoute redirects unauthorized /retos access - PASS (expected behavior)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation fix verified for all non-student roles. Sidebar items now properly navigate to sub-routes. Mobile navigation uses header-menu-btn (data-testid) in Header.jsx to toggle Sidebar, NOT the HamburgerMenu drawer (which is for student's MobileLayout). All routes work correctly with proper content filtering via 'section' prop.
